title: Oneg Shabbat: How to Create Joy on the Sabbath
title_zh: 安息日之乐:如何在安息日创造喜悦
title_he: עונג שבת: כיצד ליצור שמחה בשבת
description: The mitzvah of enjoying Shabbat — through food, rest, intimacy, Torah study, and family time — and why pleasure is a commandment.
cultural_parallels: Chinese New Year feast (年夜饭) and Shabbat meals
Daoist yin-yang harmony and body-soul unity
Ming-Qing literati joy in refined pursuits and Torah study delight

historical_references.context: Compiler of the Mishnah who had a special Friday preparation ritual
Medieval Spain mystical text teaching about extra soul on Shabbat

author: Torah Light Project - Article Writer
